title: mentha × paludosiformis
intro: Mentha × paludosiformis, also known as water mint, is a hybrid mint species that is widely distributed across Europe. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it a popular remedy for digestive issues, colds, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of water mint include its ability to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), reduce fever, and soothe headaches and migraines. Water mint can be prepared as a tea, added to salads, or used in traditional herbal medicine as an infusion, oil, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
